title: malcolmia orsiniana subsp. serbica
intro: Malcolmia orsiniana subsp. serbica, also known as Serbian stock or Serbian wallflower, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its yellow flowers and hairy leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Malcolmia orsiniana subsp. serbica include its ability to relieve respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and its medicinal properties make it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
